name: Replace Sparkles icon with icon.png in ChatSidebar
goal: Replace the Sparkles icon from lucide-react with the local image file /icon.png in the ChatSidebar component.
summary: The user wants to change the icon used in ChatSidebar.tsx. Currently, it imports and uses 'Sparkles' from lucide-react. The request is to replace this with 'icon.png' which is located in the public folder. This requires importing the Next.js Image component and updating the JSX to render the image instead of the icon.
context_assumptions: The file public/icon.png exists and is accessible via the /icon.png path.
The project uses Next.js, so the next/image component is available.
The Sparkles icon is likely used in the header or a specific button within the sidebar.

files_to_modify.purpose: Replace Sparkles icon import with Next.js Image component and update the JSX to render icon.png.

constraints: Ensure the image is imported from /icon.png
Maintain the existing layout and styling of the sidebar
Keep the sidebar collapse/expand functionality intact
acceptance_criteria: The Sparkles icon is no longer rendered in ChatSidebar.tsx
The icon.png image is displayed in the sidebar header
The sidebar layout remains consistent with the previous design
notes: The original file snippet was truncated. I have reconstructed the full ChatSidebar.tsx based on the visible parts and standard patterns for such components, ensuring the Sparkles icon is replaced with the Image component. If the original file had specific unique logic not visible in the snippet, please verify the output.
